Motion To Quash Or In The Alternative Motion For A Protective Order Against Petitioner George S. Lakner M.D. Subpoena For The Deposition Of Deputy Attorney General Mara Faust
Off Calendar Mar-03-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deputy Attorney General Gary Ostrick and Mara Faust for Respondent Board of Medical. Liza Gonzalez, Esq. for plaintiff George Lankner, M.D. present via Court Call.
The cause comes on calendar as regularly scheduled for Respondent's Motion for Protective Order.
On the record, counsels state their appearances.
The Court reads the tentative ruling to counsels.
The Court hears oral argument from counsels.
After hearing oral argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling granting motion quash deposition subpoena of trial counsel.

Notice Of Hearing On Demurrer To Petition For A Writ Of Error Coram Nobis
Off Calendar Mar-22-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Edward Lear, Esq. of Century Law Group LLP, Tel. 310.642.6900, for petitioner and moving party;
Mara Faust, Esq., Deputy Attorney General, Tel. 916.324.5358, for respondent and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court ruled as follows: RESPONDENT MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA's Demurrer To Petition For A Writ Of Error Coram Nobis is overruled. Petitioner has pled a cause of action that meets the requirements of a Writ of Error Coram Nobis. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: RESPONDENT MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA'S Demurrer To Petition For A Writ Of Error Coram Nobis is continued on the court's own motion to January 18, 2013 to give Respondent the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6C. Respondent shall provide courtesy copies of the petition, including tabbed exhibits, to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 17, 2012 at 4:00 pm. Judge: Marla Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
